titleStmt.title: SII 38.512: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 512. (A.R. No. 512 of 1912.) ŪṬṬATTŪR, LALGUDI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT. On the west wall, yāga-maṇḍapa, Siddharatnēśvara temple.

summary.p: Built in on the left portion of the record. Begins with the meykīrtti of the king [Pu-mādu pu]ṇara etc.,

Records that the members of the mūlasabhā of Śrīkaṇṭa-chaturvēdimaṅgalam deposited ten kāśu in the treasury, which they obtained as price for the land they sold to a certain Āridan Sōlai Perumāṉ. It is stated that land was obtained by the sabhā through confiscation, originally belonged to a brāhmaṇa, Vasiṭṭan Tiruchchiṟṟam •••••, a resident of Ūṟṟattūr in Ūṟṟattūr-nāḍu, (a sub-division of) Tribhuvaṉamuḻuḍaivaḷanāḍu, perhaps a priest in the temple at Ūṟṟattūr. The said priest had committed a minor offence in the Uḍaiyār Tugumāmaṇiyāṇḍār temple of the above village and he was fined 20 aṉṟāḍu-naṟkāśu. Besides the priest was unable to pay the taxes on his land at Paṟaichchēri, a locality in Śrīkaṇṭa-chaturvēdimaṅgalam. Hence his land was seized and half of it (sembādi) was sold by the mūlasabhā.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
ṇarap puvimātu vaḷara naāmātu viḷaṅka jayamaātu virumpa taṉ tiruppatumalar maṉṉavar cūṭa maṉ
cūṭi taṅkoṉ marapil ceṅkol naṭāttic ceṅkol cenṟu ticaitoṟu niṟpa veṅkali niṅ
ṅkamiriyak kaṭalmalai nāṭātti valaṅkolāḻi varaiyā naṭātti Irucuṭaraḷavum Oru kuṭai niḻaṟṟi virāsi
muḻutuṭaiyaāḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kopparakecaripanmarāṉa tripuvaṉacakkravattikaḷ śrīvikkiramacoḻade
tiripuvaṉamuḻutuṭaivaḷanāṭṭu Ūṟṟattūrnāṭṭu Ūṟṟattūr Irukkum pirāmaṇan vaciṭṭan tiruciṟṟam
ṇi Uṭaiyār tukumāmaṇiyāṇṭār sirikoyilile ciṟitu Aparātam cetamaiyil Ivvaparātam
lum Ivaṉai Inta Aparātattukku taṇṭam Ēviṉa kācu 2 10 Irupatu Ikkācu Irupatum Ivan nilai
Ivan cikaṇṭacaṟuppetimaṅkalattu tān vilai koṇṭuṭaiya kāṇikku Iṟai Iṟukkamāṭṭāmai
cīkaṇṭacatuppetimaṅkalattu mūlasabhaiyom tevar śrīpaṇṭārattu Iṟuttamaiyil
muṭaiyān tukumāmaṇi nilam cīkaṇṭacatuppetimaṅkalattu mulasabhaikku camaintu
tokumāmaṇiyum kavicikaṉ tirinilakaṇṭan cakkarapāṇiyum Āritaṉ cirāḷaṉ ciṟiyāṉum kavicikaṉ pe
vicikaṉ tukumāmaṇi periya nampiyum kavicikaṉ Uyyavantāṉ kovum kavicikaṉ tiruvālaṉtuṟai
ṭṭa mulasabhaiyom Ivvūr bhirāmaṇaṉ Āritancolaiperumāṉukku nāṅkaḷ sabhaivilaiyāka
yāvaṇamāvatu Ivvūr kiḻūril paṟaicceriyil Ivanopātiyil cempāti nilaṅkalantapaṭi nan
kuṭuttuk koḷvatāṉa Emmilicainta vilaipporuḷ Aṉṟāṭu naṟkācu 10 pattu Ikkācu pattum Āva
k koṇṭu Innilavilaiyāvaṇam ceytu kuṭuttom Āritancolai perumāṉukku mulasa
cikan tirunilakaṇṭan tokumāmaṇiyum kaucikaṉ tirunilakaṇṭan cakkarapāṇiyum Ā
nampi viccātiraṉum kauvicikaṉ tukumāmaṇi periyanampiyum kaucikaṉ Uyyavantān ko
tirunāḷuṭaiyāṉum Uḷḷiṭṭa mulasabhaiyom Intappaṟaicceri ceyyil vaciṭṭan tiru
kumāmaṇi nilattil nilaṅkalantapaṭi cempāti nancey punceykkum Ituvey vilai
ṇamāvatākavum Ituvey poruḷ māvaṟutip poruḷ celavolaiyāvatākavum Itu val
rākavum IppataRead as ippaṭi sammatittu Ikkācu 10 pattum AvaṇakkaḷiyeRead āvaṇakkaḷariyilekaiccelavaṟakkoṇṭu
vanopātiyile cempāti nancey punceyyum vilaiyaṟaviṟṟup poruḷaṟa koṇṭu viṟṟu
Āritan colai perumāṉukku cikaṇṭaccatuppetimaṅkalattu mulasabhaikku camantuRead as camaintu. This record is incomplete.
Digital edition of SII 38.512 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
